purpose: This repository provides contract definitions for a loan selling system within a financial institution. It defines data structures and types for managing loan purchases, transfers, discrepancies, and related financial processes between different entities in a lending ecosystem.

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Represents a loan in the selling system with details about origination, sale status, amounts, and investor information

dataEntities.name: PagedLoanItem
dataEntities.description: Simplified representation of a loan for listing and pagination purposes

dataEntities.name: Invoice
dataEntities.description: Represents a purchase invoice containing loans to be purchased and associated fees

dataEntities.name: Receipt
dataEntities.description: Records the results of a loan purchase process including successful and failed purchases

dataEntities.name: Investor
dataEntities.description: Entity that purchases loans from the originator

dataEntities.name: Bank
dataEntities.description: Financial institution involved in the loan process as issuer or servicer

dataEntities.name: Mpl
dataEntities.description: Marketplace lender entity in the loan ecosystem

dataEntities.name: Discrepancy
dataEntities.description: Represents differences between expected and actual loan data

dataEntities.name: BatchInfo
dataEntities.description: Tracking information for batch processes with status counts and timing

dataEntities.name: PurchaseAccount
dataEntities.description: Account used for loan purchase transactions

dataEntities.name: SofrRate
dataEntities.description: Secured Overnight Financing Rate data used for interest calculations

messagingPatterns.name: LoanBatchPurchaseRequest
messagingPatterns.description: Request to process a batch of loans for purchase with specified parameters

messagingPatterns.name: PurchaseDateUpdateBatchRequest
messagingPatterns.description: Request to update purchase dates for a batch of loans

findings.title: PII data marked but not secured
findings.description: PIIDataAttribute is defined but there's no evidence of encryption or special handling of PII-marked properties. The borrower's SSN, address, DOB, and other personal information should have additional protection mechanisms.

findings.title: Missing validation attributes on critical financial fields
findings.description: Financial values like loan amounts, interest rates, and fees lack validation attributes to ensure they're within acceptable ranges. This could allow invalid data to be processed, potentially causing financial discrepancies.
